experience.title: Digital Marketing Intern
responsibilities: Assisted in the design and implementation of digital marketing campaigns across social media platforms.
Utilized Google Analytics to track user engagement and optimize content strategies.
Created engaging content for blog posts and social media channels, increasing audience interaction by 30%.
Conducted A/B testing for email campaigns to improve open rates and click-through rates.
Collaborated with the design team to develop visual content using Canva and Adobe Spark.
achievements: Increased social media engagement by 25% through strategic content planning and execution.
Contributed to a project that enhanced brand awareness, leading to a 15% rise in website traffic.

skills.name: Content Creation (Blog and Social Media Posts)

response.summary: Motivated and detail-oriented Marketing graduate with hands-on experience in digital marketing strategies, user experience optimization, and content creation. Proven ability to drive engagement and enhance customer experiences through innovative digital solutions.
